items.title: 3 No-Brainer Dividend Stocks to Buy in 2025
items.author: Jennifer Saibil
items.description: The article discusses three excellent dividend stocks: Realty Income, Home Depot, and Coca-Cola. Realty Income is a REIT with a stable and growing business, high yield, and a long history of dividend payments. Home Depot is meeting the omnichannel moment and generating higher revenue despite a slow housing market. Coca-Cola is a Dividend King with pricing power and diverse beverage categories.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Realty Income is described as a top dividend stock with an excellent business, high yield, and growing dividend. It has a stable and growing business, a long track record of consecutive dividend payments and increases, and a dividend yield of 5.9%.

Home Depot is the largest home improvement chain in the world, and it is meeting the omnichannel moment and generating higher revenue despite a slow housing market. The company is constantly upgrading its platform and has an excellent dividend with a yield of 2.2%.

Coca-Cola is described as a classic great dividend stock, being a Dividend King with a commitment to raising its dividend annually for the past 62 years. It has pricing power in its loved brands and opportunities for growth in its diverse beverage categories, with a dividend yield of 3.1%.
